case_title: EMMA JAMES BLOOM-SWEENEY VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2018 BY PRO TEM ANNE WONG. 506 PLAINTIFF EMMA JAMES BLOOM-SWEENEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY KATHY ZUMSKI, PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF CLAIM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY BLOOM-SWEENEY, EMMA JAMES JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BLOOM-SWEENEY, EMMA JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOOM-SWEENEY, EMMA JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLOOM-SWEENEY, EMMA JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK $7,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
